name: Nebula Components
description: AI agent for landing page conversion optimization — audits, diagnoses, and fixes pages that aren't converting paid traffic.

skills.name: Landing Page Audit
skills.description: Analyzes a landing page for conversion leaks: CRO, copy, trust signals, load speed, mobile UX, and ad-to-page message match.

skills.name: Conversion Fix Implementation
skills.description: Implements audit findings — rewrites copy, fixes layout, improves CTAs, and delivers a production-ready page.
